nodes.label: AI as analytical tool for parsing documents
nodes.label_negative: AI as unreliable or error-prone analyst
nodes.grounding_span: Using AI to parse through large documents or large amounts of data is very helpful and satisfying

nodes.label: AI as collaborative drafting assistant
nodes.label_negative: AI as replacement for human judgment
nodes.grounding_span: I collaborate back and forth during the drafting process. I am looking for the assistant to help me rather than replace me

nodes.label: Trust in AI output
nodes.grounding_span: The more you trust the output the bigger role it will have in my work place

nodes.label: AI ability to capture nuanced language
nodes.label_negative: AI inability to capture nuanced language
nodes.grounding_span: AI still isn't good enough to capture nuanced language

nodes.label: Confidentiality constraints on AI use
nodes.grounding_span: AI is not allowed to be used on the company platform... anything written on an AI platform becomes open access

nodes.label: Productivity and time savings
nodes.grounding_span: AI being used for this purpose provides a huge time savings

nodes.label: Professional credibility and quality
nodes.grounding_span: I prefer to do my own final draft writing... I can also better incorporate strategy and messaging

nodes.label: Human relationships and personal touch
nodes.grounding_span: AI still can't replace customer relationships and the human element of the job

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI for data parsing
nodes.grounding_span: Using AI to parse through large documents or large amounts of data is very helpful and satisfying

nodes.label: Preference for human final draft writing
nodes.grounding_span: I prefer to do my own final draft writing

nodes.label: Cautious trust in AI output
nodes.grounding_span: The output created by AI still must be checked. It does make errors at time that must be caught

nodes.label: Optimism about future AI role with increased trust
nodes.grounding_span: As AI becomes more intelligent it will play a much bigger role in my day to day production

nodes.label: Verification-oriented reasoning — tests AI output against data
nodes.grounding_span: Once the assistant calls out a trend I dig deeper into the data to confirm that trend

nodes.label: Adaptive boundary-setting — distinguishes tasks for AI vs. self
nodes.grounding_span: Being adaptable and flexible are key. AI is meant to make you more productive rather than put you out of a job altogether
